role_title: Senior Associate, Sales Strategy & Operations, Commerce Platform

level_signals: Title is 'Senior Associate' — below Manager level
Reports to a Sales Strategy & Operations Manager
Base pay range $88,400–$130,000 USD consistent with mid-level IC at DoorDash

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: You have 2+ years of experience in any of the following fields: sales/business planning, strategy & operations, business consulting, analytics
You have a proven track record of driving cross-functional initiatives, hitting goals, and succeeding in a complex and fast moving environment
You have a bachelor's degree or higher
You're an excellent analytical thinker who can deliver actionable recommendations out of complex datasets; SQL and Excel experience is required.

scope.surface: Digital Ordering (white-label commission-free ordering solution for SMB merchants); Commerce Platform sales org
scope.business_model: B2B SaaS / marketplace — DoorDash selling technology solutions to SMB restaurants
primary_metrics_inferred: SMB merchant growth / new merchant acquisition
Sales productivity improvements via AI tooling
core_responsibilities: Translate high-level company objectives into actionable quarterly sales goals
Audit sales funnels and support buildout of new systems and processes
Run cadence of the business including Weekly Business Reviews
Ensure every lead, opportunity, and deal is tracked with precision
Implement tooling and systems updates to improve sales team efficiency
Optimize the sales funnel through meticulous measurement and inspection
Explore and pilot the latest AI tools and technologies to drive improvements in sales productivity and outreach effectiveness

green_flags: Equity grants mentioned in addition to base salary
Clear reporting structure (reports to Sales Strategy & Operations Manager)
Specific product surface named (Digital Ordering white-label solution) — not vague
Comprehensive benefits package described in detail
Applications accepted on an ongoing basis — active role
Only one strongly preferred (not required) tool (Salesforce)
red_flags: Location not specified — work location type (remote, hybrid, onsite) is entirely unclear from the JD body; only pay range geography reference is 'national' including Illinois and Colorado
NYC-specific AI hiring tool (Covey) disclosure suggests automated screening may be in use

fields_inferred_not_stated: seniority.level (inferred from title 'Senior Associate', reporting structure, years required, and comp range)
